-->
Modularize the offline postprocessor utility. 3826273012

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->

- Tasks:
  - [x] move functions to src
  - [x] add tests
  - [x] add docs
  - [x] implement in driver
  - ~~update for CLimaComms 0.3.4 https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/208 (in tests and mpi_tests - 4x)~~ (this will be more work than originally expected, so will be addressed as part of #208 )

title: Interface Postprocessor v2
